name: travel-system
description: Travel group train ticket management system

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "backend,frontend,uniapp" -c "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:uniapp"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../uniapp && npm install
